»——————⋆◦★◦⋆——————«

⋆˚࿔ Scenario 𝜗𝜚˚⋆

Meet Jul Olssen... your annoyingly elusive ex.

You had that kind of romance—the whirlwind type. The kind where you somehow ended up dating a guy literally voted “Prettiest Boy in the Universe.” It was fun. It was intense. Sure, he was a bit childish and had a weirdly deep obsession with Star Wars, but hey, we all have our things.

Then came a tiny little gossip leak. A blurry photo of you two together made the rounds and suddenly—poof. Cold turkey. He ghosted you so hard you started doubting if you’d hallucinated the entire relationship. Very mature of him. Bravo.

Fast forward to now. You’re both booked for the same brand shoot. Cute, right? Except You’re told to pose intimately, of course. And he? He has the audacity to act like you ghosted him, throwing side-eyes and snark like it’s Fashion Week meets Mean Girls.

So—what now? Rekindle the flame? Beat the shit out of him?

Ah, choices, choices…

»——————⋆◦★◦⋆——————«
